headline: Warren Buffett Will Never Sell These 4 Favorite ‘Forever’ Dividend Giants
summary: Warren Buffett stepped down as CEO of Berkshire Hathaway on December 31, 2025, after six decades leading the conglomerate he transformed from a struggling textile mill into a $1 trillion empire. The “Oracle of Omaha” left his successor, Greg Abel, with a very concentrated portfolio: almost 65% of Berkshire’s $381 billion portfolio is invested in ... Warren Buffett Will Never Sell These 4 Favorite ‘Forever’ Dividend Giants

headline: Moody’s Corporation to Present at the Barclays 18th Annual Americas Select Conference on May 6, 2026
summary: NEW YORK, April 29, 2026--Moody’s Corporation (NYSE: MCO) announced today that Noémie Heuland, Chief Financial Officer, will speak at the Barclays 18th Annual Americas Select Conference in London on Wednesday, May 6, 2026. The presentation will begin at approximately 9:45 a.m. BST (4:45 a.m. EDT) and will be webcast live. The webcast will be accessible at Moody’s Investor Relations website, ir.moodys.com.
